title: Brick's Building
description: A modpack for my Create: Aeronautics Prep Builds. Features several mods related to create as well as various QOL and building mods.
body:
The modpack of Brickfarmer10. The pack includes mods like Axiom to aid in building as well as mods related to create. Most of my builds are created in preparation for the mod *Create: Aeronautics*, a yet to be released mod that will enable the creation of airships in Minecraft. __The pack is required for garunteed functionality of my schematics, which can be found in my discord server linked below:__

***Discord***
[https://discord.gg/GEHh7PPy7K](https://discord.gg/GEHh7PPy7K)

***Youtube***
[https://www.youtube.com/@Brickfarmer10](https://www.youtube.com/@Brickfarmer10)
